data.title: Iranian media: The head of the negotiating delegation has not resigned; related rumors are being spread for the purpose of disrupting public opinion.
data.description: According to Iran's International Television, Ayman Shamsaye, head of the Iranian Parliament's Center for Communications, Media and Cultural Affairs, responded to reports of Ghalibaf's resignation, stating that Ghalibaf has not resigned and is still diligently fulfilling his duties. He added that the rumors were spread for the purpose of misleading public opinion. Earlier reports from Iranian media indicated that Ghalibaf, the head of the Iranian delegation negotiating with the United States in Islamabad, had resigned and withdrawn from the negotiating team.

data.title: Zondacrypto CEO Faces Investigation Amid Alleged Fraud and Missing Bitcoin
data.description: Polish prosecutors are currently investigating Zondacrypto over allegations of fraud and potential losses amounting to at least 350 million zloty. According to NS3.AI, reports have emerged that CEO Przemyslaw Kral has traveled to Israel amid the ongoing investigation. Last week, Kral disclosed that Zondacrypto was unable to access a cold wallet containing 4,500 Bitcoin. Former board member Georgi Dzaniašvili revealed that supervisors became aware of the crisis's magnitude through media reports rather than internal communications.

data.title: Web3 Gaming Projects Face Decline as Funding Drops
data.description: Caladan reports that 93% of Web3 gaming projects have become inactive following a ChainPlay review of over 3,200 GameFi titles. According to NS3.AI, Caladan estimates that approximately $12 billion has been invested in these projects since 2020. However, the average token prices have plummeted by 95% from their peaks in 2022. Additionally, annual funding has significantly decreased from $4 billion in 2022 to around $360 million in 2025.

data.title: Airlines Reduce Flights as Jet Fuel Prices Surge
data.description: Airlines are reducing their flight schedules following the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, which has caused jet fuel prices to more than double. According to NS3.AI, Lufthansa Group announced it will cancel 20,000 short-haul flights through October. Domestic airfare has increased by approximately 18% compared to last year, translating to around $55 more per trip. IEA Director Fatih Birol has warned that Europe has about six weeks of jet fuel stocks remaining.

data.title: China-Linked Cyber Threats Exploit Botnets for Global Attacks
data.description: The National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC), along with 15 international partners, has issued a joint advisory warning about cyber threats linked to China. According to NS3.AI, these threat actors are using botnets composed of compromised internet devices to conceal their attacks. One such botnet, known as Raptor Train, reportedly infected over 200,000 devices globally in 2024. The advisory also references Department of Justice filings, which indicate that the group Volt Typhoon has established footholds in critical infrastructure across the United States and allied nations.

data.title: Abraxas Capital deposited 4,835 BTC, worth $378 million, into Kraken.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Abraxas Capital (abra...unds) deposited 4,835 Bitcoins, worth $378 million, into Kraken in the past hour. Additionally, the firm deposited 6,000 XAUTs, worth $28 million, into Binance, Bybit, OKX, and Bitfinex.

data.title: An address suspected to belong to the LAB team transferred 100 million tokens to three Bitget deposit addresses, representing 43.4% of the total circulating supply.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, LAB core-related addresses recently made concentrated fund transfers to three Bitget deposit addresses (0xDd7..., 0x659..., 0xb11...). Statistics show that these three addresses received a total of 100 million LAB tokens, worth approximately $64.96 million USD, which were subsequently deposited into Bitget hot wallets. Currently, the circulating supply of LAB is 230.4M, and the total amount received by these three addresses accounts for approximately 43.4% of its total circulating supply. LAB is currently trading at $0.6496, down 0.74% in the last 24 hours, with a circulating market capitalization of approximately $149 million. A single aggregation and deposit of over 40% of the circulating shares may indicate a large-scale sell-off or adjustments by market makers.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Market Opens Higher with Tech Stocks Leading Gains
data.description: On April 24, U.S. stock markets opened with gains as the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 0.1%, the S&P 500 increased by 0.38%, and the Nasdaq Composite climbed over 0.6%. According to Jin10, Intel (INTC.O) surged 24%, reaching a record high after its first-quarter earnings and second-quarter guidance exceeded expectations. AMD (AMD.O) rose by 7.7%, Arm (ARM.O) gained 7.5%, and the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index increased by 3.7%. Amazon (AMZN.O) saw a 1.4% rise, following an agreement with Meta to use Amazon's Graviton CPU chips for AI development.

data.title: ECB Signs Agreement to Utilize Existing Payment Standards for Digital Euro
data.description:
The European Central Bank (ECB) has entered into agreements with the European Card Payment Cooperation, Nexo Standards, and Berlin Group to repurpose existing open payment standards for digital euro transactions. According to ChainCatcher, this initiative aims to reduce system access costs for banks, merchants, and payment service providers.

The standards include contactless payments, merchant and payment service provider connectivity, and alias-based payments such as those using phone numbers. The ECB believes this move will lower market adoption costs and foster a unified digital euro experience across the eurozone. Previously, the ECB estimated that the digital euro could impose costs of approximately 4 billion to 6 billion euros on EU banks within four years.

In commodities, WTI crude oil is down 2.09%, trading at $98.26 per barrel. Brent crude oil is down 1.61%, trading at $105.72 per barrel. data.title: Coinbase will launch spot trading of Fluent (BLEND).
data.description: Coinbase will launch spot trading for Fluent (BLEND). The BLEND-USD trading pair will open later today, provided liquidity conditions are met and trading is supported.

data.title: Crypto stocks opened higher across the board, with Strategy (MSTR) up 2.10%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.18%, the S&P 500 rose 0.26%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.67%. The crypto sector rallied across the board, with Solana rising 2.35%, Circle rising 2.21%, Strategy (MSTR) rising 2.10%, Coinbase rising 1.88%, Bitmine rising 1.41%, and SharpLink rising 0.40%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Aptos Gains 3.5% Leading CoinDesk 20 Index Higher
data.description: Aptos experienced a 3.5% increase, spearheading the rise of the CoinDesk 20 index, which climbed 0.7% to reach 2130.2. According to NS3.AI, CoinDesk Indices reported that the benchmark rose by 14.28 points since 4 p.m. ET on Thursday, with all 20 assets showing gains.

data.title: Wisconsin has sued Kalshi, Robinhood, Coinbase, and other organizations for alleged illegal sports betting.
data.description: Wisconsin Attorney General Josh Kaul filed a lawsuit in Dan County on April 23 against Kalshi, Robinhood, Coinbase, Polymarket, and Crypto.com, accusing these fintech and crypto platforms of facilitating illegal sports betting through event contracts. Kaul is seeking preliminary and permanent injunctions to declare the platforms' operations illegal under Wisconsin betting law and a public hazard. The complaint states that rebranding betting as event contracts does not change their fundamental function; Kalshi derives approximately 90% of its business from sports-related contracts, generating over $1 billion in annualized revenue. Robinhood and Coinbase are also implicated in the case because they route user orders to the Kalshi marketplace through distribution agreements. Regulatory agencies in Nevada, Arizona, and Tennessee have also taken similar legal action or issued stop-loss orders.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 640 USDT with a 0.75% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 24, 2026, 13:12 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 640 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 640.280029 USDT, with a narrowed 0.75% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Iranian Negotiator Resigns Amid Talks with U.S.
data.description: Iranian International Television reports that the head of Iran's delegation in negotiations with the United States in Islamabad, Kalibaf, has resigned and withdrawn from the talks. According to Odaily, this development coincided with a short-term increase in oil prices, with Brent and WTI crude rising by nearly $1. Brent is currently priced at $98.4 per barrel, while WTI stands at $100.07 per barrel.

data.title: STOCKS | KeyBanc Sets $325 Price Target for Amazon Ahead of Earnings Call
data.description: KeyBanc Capital Markets has set a price target of $325 for Amazon stock in anticipation of the company's earnings call on April 29. According to NS3.AI, Amazon shares were trading at $255, suggesting a potential upside of approximately 28% if the target is achieved.

data.title: Brazil's Inflation and Economic Growth Projections for 2026 and 2027
data.description: According to a Reuters survey, Brazil's inflation is expected to be 4.5% in 2026 and 3.9% in 2027, compared to January's forecast of 4.0% and 3.8%, respectively. The Brazilian economy is projected to grow by 1.8% in both 2026 and 2027, consistent with the January forecast of 1.8% for 2026 and a slight adjustment from 1.9% for 2027. Out of 35 economists surveyed, 31 anticipate that the Brazilian central bank will lower the key interest rate from 14.75% to 14.50% on April 29.

data.title: Kremlin Indicates Putin May Attend G20 Summit in Miami
data.description: The Kremlin has announced that Russian President Vladimir Putin might travel to Miami, USA, for the G20 Summit. According to Odaily, this potential visit marks a significant diplomatic engagement for Russia on the international stage.

data.title: South Africa Proposes New Capital Flow Management Regulations
data.description: South Africa's Treasury has released the draft of the 2026 Capital Flow Management Regulations for public consultation. According to PANews, the draft aims to restructure the current foreign exchange control framework under the Currency and Exchanges Act. Key proposals include aligning with the OECD and FATF recommendations on anti-money laundering, counter-terrorism financing, and curbing illicit financial flows. For the first time, crypto-assets will be included in the foreign exchange control scope to enhance risk management and regulation. The draft also clarifies exemptions, licensing, and applicable conditions, and introduces administrative penalties for violations. Feedback must be emailed to the National Treasury within 30 days of the announcement.
